name: Red Coast
epithet: the antenna that answered — solar-amplified radio first contact

name: The Sophon
epithet: a proton unfolded into a computer — the leash on human science

name: The Droplet
epithet: a perfect mirror that kills — the strong-force probe

name: The Dual-Vector Foil
epithet: death by art — collapsing 3D space into 2D

name: The Nanofilament “Flying Blade”
epithet: the molecular wire that sliced a ship — and the one device in all three media

name: Curvature Propulsion
epithet: lightspeed by bending spacetime — and the black domain

name: The Human-Formation Computer
epithet: thirty million soldiers as a CPU — inside the Three-Body game

name: The Staircase Program
epithet: a radiation sail pushed by nuclear bombs — to launch a brain at the stars

name: The Space Elevator
epithet: a ribbon to orbit — the megastructure that's only waiting on materials

name: Hibernation
epithet: cryosleep across centuries — how the cast survives the long war

name: Deterrence Broadcast & the Photoid
epithet: gravitational-wave antennas that hold a world hostage — and the star-killing bullet

name: The Mental Seal & the Wallfacers
epithet: strategy hidden in the mind — and a machine that installs belief
